beat: Elara on Fracture road with egg
artPrompt: Western fantasy COMIC PAGE with THREE HORIZONTAL TIERS (stacked panels) separated by equal white gutters and thick black borders. Tier 1 wide: courier Elara Venn walking a cracked Fracture road under a pale cyan sky, glowing egg wrapped against her chest. Tier 2: two side-by-side panels — left Elara mid-shot speaking; right a cloaked stranger pointing toward a distant crown road. Tier 3 wide: Elara turning away from the stranger, jaw set, egg warm in her arms. Sequential Z-path. NO floating creature card insets, NO collage lore plates. Earth tones, cyan accents. Original Riftwilds IP. NO readable text, balloons, logos, or UI in the art.

lines.text: Nine days before the Commons had a name.

lines.speaker: Elara Venn
lines.text: The egg is warm. That is enough to keep walking.
